## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is minimal and tied to a linked issue or spec subtask.
- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `composer ci` passes locally.
- [ ] Commits are signed and conventional. (release-please generates `CHANGELOG.md` from conventional commits in sub-project F — do not edit `CHANGELOG.md` manually.)
